new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage characterised by the addition of sugar or other sweetening matter and flavouring substances (plants, fruits, or aromatic substances), typically produced by mixing distilled spirits with sweetening and flavouring agents; classified under CN heading 2208 70.

new_classes.label_de: Likör in Behältnissen von 2 Litern oder weniger (KN 2208 70 10)
new_classes.definition_en: Liqueur presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres, classified under CN subheading 2208 70 10.
Quality borne by a liqueur indicating the presence of added sugar or other sweetening matter as a defining characteristic distinguishing liqueur from other spirituous beverages under heading 2208.

coverage_explanation: The legal note for CN 2208 70 10 refers to "Likör" (Liqueur) and directs to HS Explanatory Notes for heading 2208, first paragraph, letter B and third paragraph. These describe liqueur as a spirituous beverage characterised by the addition of sweetening matter and flavouring substances. The key distinguishing criteria are: (1) it is a spirituous beverage (captured via subClassOf SpiritousBeverage), (2) it contains added sugar or sweetening matter (captured via AddedSugarOrSweeteningMatterQuality and LiqueurSweeteningQuality restrictions), (3) it contains added flavouring (captured via AddedFlavouringQuality restriction), and (4) for CN 2208 70 10 specifically, it is in containers ≤ 2 L (captured via SmallContainer part restriction on LiqueurInSmallContainer). Coverage is reduced because: (a) the HS Explanatory Notes also specify minimum sugar content thresholds (typically 100 g/L or 250 g/L for crème liqueurs) which cannot be expressed precisely without a numeric sugar-content datatype property not present in the TBox; (b) the note references the HS third paragraph which may include additional product-type criteria not fully representable with existing TBox vocabulary; (c) CN 2208 70 90 (containers > 2 L) is the sibling subheading but the current request is for 2208 70 10 only.
